description: Valid MCP (Model Context Protocol) server configuration for Claude Code

location.local: ~/.claude.json under project path (default scope, private to you, current project only)
location.project: .mcp.json (checked into version control, shared with team)
location.user: ~/.claude.json under mcpServers key (available across all projects)
location.managed: managed-mcp.json in system directories (organization-wide, exclusive control)

structure.description: JSON object with server entries keyed by server name

http.description: Server communicates via streamable HTTP (recommended for remote servers)

sse.description: Server communicates via Server-Sent Events over HTTP (DEPRECATED - use http instead)

type.description: Transport type for the server. 'http' is recommended for remote servers.

command.description: Path to the server executable (required for stdio type)

args.description: Command-line arguments passed to the server

env.description: Environment variables passed to the server process

url.description: URL of the endpoint (required for http and sse types)

headers.description: HTTP headers with environment variable interpolation ($VAR or ${VAR}). Use with allowedEnvVars for security.

oauth.description: OAuth 2.0 configuration for servers requiring authentication

fields.callbackPort: Fixed port for OAuth callback URL (http://localhost:PORT/callback)
fields.authServerMetadataUrl: Override URL for OAuth metadata discovery

envVarExpansion.description: Environment variable expansion is supported in .mcp.json files

syntax.${VAR}: Expands to the value of environment variable VAR
syntax.${VAR:-default}: Expands to VAR if set, otherwise uses default

toolNaming.description: MCP tools appear with a namespaced convention

hookIntegration.description: MCP tools can be matched in hooks using patterns

features.resources: MCP servers can expose resources referenced via @ mentions (e.g. @github:issue://123)
features.prompts: MCP server prompts appear as /mcp__servername__promptname commands
features.toolSearch: When MCP tools exceed 10% of context, Claude Code defers tools and discovers them on demand via ToolSearch
features.elicitation: MCP servers can request structured input from users mid-task via elicitation dialogs
features.dynamicUpdates: Claude Code supports MCP list_changed notifications for dynamic tool updates

scopes.description: Scope hierarchy for MCP servers (highest to lowest priority)
scopes.note: When servers with the same name exist at multiple scopes, higher-priority scope wins

items: Background subagents cannot use MCP tools
MCP servers must be installed and accessible on the system
Environment variables in env are passed only to the server process
Server crashes require manual restart (re-enter the session)
SSE transport is deprecated — use http transport instead

managedMcp.note: When deployed, takes exclusive control — users cannot add/modify MCP servers
